blocks.text:
To: Barbara Ward
Cc: Deborah Gordon, Brenda Rodriguez

Thank you for getting the first tranche of pricing and invoice data to us so quickly. Brenda Rodriguez has started building the realization picture for {{fact:f:E-2009-004.client}} from it, and the early cut already shows the kind of spread between list and collected price that made this work worth doing. We are not drawing conclusions yet; there is more to fold in before the numbers hold still.

Two items would help us keep pace. We are still short the rebate and allowance detail for the last two years, which we need before the realization figure means anything, and we would like the discount-authority guidelines your sales managers work to, if such a document exists. Everything we have received from the Garza, Leblanc and Porter side so far has come in clean and well labeled, which makes the work faster.

Deborah Gordon is lining up the interviews on how prices get set. Could you point us to two or three people who quote and discount day to day? A half hour with each over the next couple of weeks is all we need to start.
